# Aviv Msika

Aviv Msika is a multidisciplinary creative professional operating at the intersection of strategy and visual artistry — blending social media management, creative direction, professional photography, and video editing into a seamless, end-to-end service offering. The brand exudes a chic, luminous, and sophisticated aesthetic tailored for high-end lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce clients who demand both strategic depth and stunning visual output. The portfolio site should feel like a curated editorial experience — clean, bright, and artistically refined — with a softly feminine yet powerfully professional tone that positions Aviv as a premium creative partner.

Source: https://example.com

---

## social media management platforms — Aviv Msika

URL: https://example.com
Description: Aviv Msika blends creative direction with social media management platforms to craft stunning, strategy-driven content for luxury lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce brands. Discover your edge.

Social Media & Creative Strategy



# Aviv MsikaStrategy Meets Vision



### Photography, video, content strategy, and creative direction — delivered as one seamless, end-to-end experience.



Get in Touch
View Portfolio


















What I Do

## Integrated CreativeStrategy & Execution




From initial concept through publish-ready assets, every project is handled end-to-end — strategy, production, and delivery unified under one creative vision. A seamless social media management service built for brands that refuse to compromise on quality.













01

### Social MediaManagement


A comprehensive social media management service that transforms brand presence through disciplined strategy, consistent voice, and platform-native content built to perform.


- Platform strategy & channel planning

- Content calendar development

- Community management & engagement

- Analytics reporting & optimisation

- Paid social campaign oversight









02

### CreativeDirection


Concept-to-execution creative direction that aligns visual identity with strategic goals — ensuring every campaign asset feels cohesive, elevated, and intentionally crafted.


- Brand visual identity alignment

- Campaign concepting & moodboarding

- Art direction for shoots & productions

- Styling, set design & prop curation

- Creative brief development








03

### Photo & VideoProduction


Professional photography and video editing delivered as a single, integrated offering — from on-location capture to colour-graded, platform-optimised, publish-ready final assets.


- Lifestyle & product photography

- Reels, TikTok & short-form video

- Colour grading & retouching

- Motion graphics & text overlays

- Multi-format export & delivery



















Selected Work

## A Curated Lookat the Work


From sun-drenched lifestyle campaigns to artfully styled culinary content and precision-crafted e-commerce visuals — a glimpse into the creative world of Aviv Msika. Each project is shaped by both strategy and a refined visual eye.

## About Me — Aviv Msika

URL: https://example.com/about
Description: About Me | Aviv Msika. social media management platforms

About Me — Aviv Msika






























Skip to main content















- Home
- About Me
- Portfolio
- Clients



Contact













About Aviv

# Creative Vision.Strategic Depth.



I'm Aviv Msika — a multidisciplinary creative professional working at the intersection of strategy and visual artistry. With a background spanning social media management, creative direction, professional photography, and video editing, I offer a seamless, end-to-end service built for brands that refuse to compromise on quality.


My approach to social media management goes beyond scheduling posts. I develop cohesive brand narratives, design scroll-stopping visuals, and produce cinematic content — all in-house, all under one creative roof. From strategy to production, every element is crafted with intention.



### What I Do


- Social Media Strategy Platform-native content planning, audience growth, and engagement-driven campaigns tailored for lifestyle and e-commerce brands.

- Creative Direction Art-directed shoots, moodboarding, and brand visual identity that translate seamlessly across digital touchpoints.

- Photography & Videography Professional stills and motion capture for culinary, lifestyle, and product contexts — bright, editorial, and on-brand.

- Video Editing Reels, TikToks, and long-form edits crafted with rhythm, pacing, and a keen eye for storytelling that converts.




Work With Me  →




















## From Strategyto Polished Delivery


Every project follows a deliberate, end-to-end methodology — blending strategic clarity with meticulous creative execution. This is how an idea becomes a campaign that performs across social channels and beyond.









01




### Discovery & Consultation


We begin with a deep-dive conversation to understand your brand identity, audience, objectives, and competitive landscape. This intake shapes the entire creative direction — ensuring every decision that follows is grounded in real strategy, not assumption.







02




### Concept & Planning


With a clear strategic foundation, we develop a tailored content plan — mood boards, visual references, messaging pillars, and a production schedule. This phase transforms your brand goals into a cohesive creative blueprint ready for execution.







03




### Production & Editing


From on-location photography and video capture to meticulous post-production — every image is retouched, every reel is cut with intention. This is where the creative vision comes to life with precision, warmth, and a distinctly elevated aesthetic.







04




### Delivery & Launch


Polished assets are packaged and delivered in formats optimised for each social channel and campaign. Final files are accompanied by a scheduling strategy and caption guidance — so your content arrives ready to publish and built to perform.























Core Strengths

## Where Strategy MeetsVisual Excellence


A multidisciplinary approach to social media management service — from concept to content, every touchpoint is crafted with intention, consistency, and an unwavering eye for quality.












### Social Media Management



End-to-end social media management platforms strategy tailored for high-end lifestyle and e-commerce brands. From editorial calendars and community engagement to analytics-driven optimisation — every channel is handled with strategic clarity and brand consistency.


- Content strategy & planning

- Community management

- Analytics & performance reporting

- Brand voice development









### Photography & Video



Professional still photography and video production for culinary, lifestyle, and e-commerce clients. Each shoot is art-directed in-house, ensuring the visual language aligns precisely with the brand's identity and campaign objectives.


- Product & lifestyle photography

- Campaign & editorial shoots

- Reels & short-form video capture

- On-set creative direction









### Editing & Post-Production



Polished video editing and post-production that transforms raw footage into scroll-stopping content. Colour grading, motion graphics, sound design, and platform-optimised formats — all delivered with the refined aesthetic your audience expects.


- Video editing & colour grading

- Reels, TikTok & campaign cuts

- Motion graphics & captions

- Platform-ready exports










Creative Direction & Styling



The Process

Every project begins with a clear visual brief and ends with content that feels effortlessly on-brand. The studio environment — from lighting to prop selection — is curated to serve the story.



End-to-end — strategy, production, and delivery under one creative roof.





Post-Production & Editing














Creative Philosophy

## Beauty & StrategyAre Inseparable



I believe the most powerful social media management service is one where creative vision and strategic intent are never in conflict — they are the same thing. Every image, caption, and campaign I craft is built on a foundation of clear objectives, audience insight, and intentional storytelling. The result is content that doesn't just look refined; it performs. For high-end lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce brands, that convergence of beauty and purpose is not a luxury — it is the standard.


### "Exceptional work is both stunning to experienceand impossible to ignore."



Aviv Msika









Social Media Management & Creative Strategy

Crafting premium digital narratives and end-to-end creative strategies that position brands with intention, elegance, and measurable impact.

Selected Work


# A Curated Edit


A disciplined mix of strategy-led social content, professional photography, campaign visuals, and short-form video edits — each project crafted end-to-end as a seamless social media management service for high-end lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce clients.













Photography
Culinary Editorial











Reel



Video
Brand Reel









Campaign
E-Commerce Creative









Photography
Restaurant Branding











Reel



Video
Content Reel









Strategy
Feed Direction
























Short-Form Video

## Reels & TikTokContent That Moves



Every frame is a decision. From the first cut to the final caption, I craft short-form video content with deliberate pacing, rhythmic editing, and a consistent visual language that feels native to the platform — yet elevated above the noise. Whether it's a slow-motion food pour, a lifestyle moment caught mid-breath, or a product reveal built for scroll-stopping impact, the result is always intentional.


This is social media management service at the level of creative direction — where strategy and storytelling become one.

Start a Project















### Food & Culinary


Slow-motion pours and close-up plating moments crafted for high-end restaurant and food brand accounts.














### Lifestyle


Authentic, sun-lit moments edited with rhythm and warmth to build aspirational brand identity on social.














### Product & E-Commerce


Scroll-stopping product reveals that translate brand identity into platform-native visual storytelling.

















Selected Work

## Client Stories


A curated selection of end-to-end creative partnerships — from strategic brief to final asset delivery.







Lifestyle



Lifestyle Brand
Instagram · Reels


### Maison Blanc — Brand Identity on Social


A refined lifestyle label sought to elevate their Instagram presence from product-centric posts to an aspirational visual world. The challenge: translate an offline luxury experience into a consistent, scroll-stopping digital aesthetic.


Deliverables

- Monthly content calendar & creative direction

- On-location photography & Reels production

- Brand tone-of-voice guidelines for captions

- Community management & engagement strategy




Result: 3× increase in organic reach within 90 days, with a 47% uplift in profile visits and consistent brand recognition across key lifestyle media.









Culinary
TikTok · Instagram


### Le Jardin Bistro — Culinary Content Campaign


A celebrated restaurant needed a cohesive social media management service that matched the artistry of their kitchen. The brief called for cinematic food storytelling — capturing texture, light, and emotion in every frame — while building a loyal community of food enthusiasts.


Deliverables

- Professional food photography & video production

- Short-form video editing (Reels & TikTok)

- Seasonal campaign concepts & art direction

- Influencer coordination & partnership briefs




Result: TikTok account grew from zero to 12K followers in 60 days; two hero videos achieved over 200K views, driving measurable reservation upticks.





Culinary







E-Commerce



E-Commerce
Paid Social · UGC


### Lumière Skin — Launch Visual Campaign


A direct-to-consumer skincare brand preparing for a product launch required a full-suite social media management approach: from pre-launch anticipation content to post-launch conversion-focused creatives, all aligned with a premium positioning strategy.


Deliverables

- Product photography & styled campaign visuals

- Paid social ad creative (Meta & TikTok formats)

- Launch content calendar (6-week arc)

- UGC brief & creator coordination




Result: Launch week exceeded sales targets by 38%; paid creative assets achieved a 4.2× ROAS, establishing the brand as a credible premium player in a competitive market.















What the Work Achieves


## Strategy That Looks as Goodas It Performs








01


### Stronger Brand Presence


Every account managed by Aviv is positioned with intention. Through a cohesive social media management service — from content calendars to community voice — brands show up consistently, confidently, and memorably across every platform that matters.





02


### Elevated Visual Identity


Photography, video, and creative direction are woven into a single, unified aesthetic language. The result is a brand that feels premium, polished, and immediately recognisable — visual storytelling that earns attention and commands trust.





03


### Cohesive Content Systems


Rather than one-off posts, Aviv builds end-to-end content systems — structured, scalable, and strategically aligned. From campaign concepting to final edit, every asset serves a purpose and contributes to a larger, commercially intentional narrative.












Ready to build something that lasts?


Start a Conversation













Social Media Management & Creative Strategy

Crafting premium digital narratives and end-to-end creative strategies that position brands with intention, elegance, and measurable impact.

Trusted Collaborations


# Brands We've Shaped Together


A curated roster of premium lifestyle, culinary, and commerce partners who trust Aviv Msika to deliver end-to-end social media management and creative strategy — from concept to content, with precision and artistry.























































































Partnering across lifestyle, culinary, and e-commerce — delivering premium social media management service and creative direction that resonates.














## Brands I Work With


From intimate lifestyle labels to ambitious e-commerce ventures, I partner with brands that understand the value of taste, consistency, and storytelling that converts. Each industry demands its own visual language — and I speak all three fluently.













### Lifestyle Brands


Lifestyle clients need more than beautiful imagery — they need a cohesive world that audiences want to inhabit. I craft social media management strategies built around mood, aspiration, and visual consistency, ensuring every post feels like a chapter in a larger, carefully curated story. From editorial flat-lays to ambient video content, I help lifestyle brands build a feed that feels unmistakably theirs.

Aesthetic Consistency · Brand World · Editorial











### Culinary & Food


Food content lives and dies by its ability to make people hungry before they even read a caption. I bring professional photography, precise colour grading, and platform-native video editing together to showcase culinary brands with appetite-driven storytelling. Whether it's a Michelin-aspirant restaurant or an artisan product line, I translate taste into visuals that stop the scroll and drive genuine desire.

Appetite-Driven · Photography · Platform-Native










### E-Commerce Brands


E-commerce brands need social media management that doesn't just look good — it converts. I develop conversion-minded content strategies that balance brand elevation with commercial clarity, pairing product photography and short-form video with captions engineered to move people from scroll to sale. Every asset I create is designed to perform as hard as it looks polished.

Conversion Strategy · Product Content · ROI-Focused





















Client Experience


## What Clients Say









Working with Aviv transformed the way our brand shows up online. From the initial strategy session to the final delivered assets, every step felt considered and intentional. Her taste level is exceptional — she understood our aesthetic immediately and elevated it beyond what we imagined. The social media management service she provided was seamless, professional, and genuinely elevated our presence.





Noa Levi
Founder, Maison Noa — Lifestyle Brand







Aviv brings a rare combination of strategic clarity and visual precision. She handled our full content cycle — concept, photography, editing, and publishing — with zero friction. Communication was always prompt and thoughtful, and the final creative output consistently exceeded expectations. If you're looking for a premium end-to-end creative partner, she is exactly that.





Roni Shapira
Owner, Atelier RS — Culinary Studio







Our e-commerce brand needed a creative director who could think in both strategy and visuals — Aviv delivered on both fronts effortlessly. She has an innate sense of what works for high-end audiences, and her execution is meticulous. Every asset she produced felt polished, on-brand, and ready to perform. We've seen a measurable improvement in engagement since working with her.





Tal Cohen
Creative Director, Bloom Studio — E-commerce

























## Let's Create SomethingWorth Remembering


I partner with brands that understand the power of both strategy and visual excellence — from social media management to end-to-end creative direction. If you're ready to elevate your presence with intentional storytelling, refined aesthetics, and results-driven content, I'd love to hear from you.

Start a Conversation

# Let's CreateSomethingWorth Noticing



Whether you're a premium brand, a culinary concept, or an e-commerce label seeking a complete social media management service — this is where it begins. The studio supports projects across social media strategy, creative direction, professional photography, and video editing, bringing each element together into one cohesive, elevated presence.


Every collaboration starts with a conversation. If you're looking for a thoughtful creative partner who brings both strategic depth and refined visual execution to the table, I'd love to hear about your project and explore how we might work together.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy































- Home
- About Me
- Portfolio
- Clients



Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/29/2026



Aviv Msika ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Aviv Msika

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- About Me
- Portfolio
- Clients



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 29, 2026



Aviv Msika is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Aviv Msika

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions































- Home
- About Me

- Clients



Contact








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 29, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Aviv Msika

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Social Media Management & Creative Strategy provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Aviv Msika provides Social Media Management & Creative Strategy through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Aviv Msika. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Aviv Msika

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
